rulings.Case Title: MICKEY H DAVIS VS. JEFFREY WINNER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Serve Defendants Within Two Years
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 11, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANT JEFFREY WINNER, STEPHANIE WINNER, ERIN WINNER's Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Serve Defendants Within Two Years OFF CALENDAR, re-noticed for May 15, 2017. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID LO et al VS. DANIEL S LEE et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 11, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT DEBBIE YOU's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the 9-11 causes of action. These causes of action are barred by the Statute of Limitations and are not subject to relation back doctrine per Kim v. Regents of Univ. of California, (2000) 80 Cal. App. 4th 160. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to 7 and 8 causes of action for Plaintiff to allege in good faith that the $90,300 were applied to 8th Avenue property. If Plaintiff cannot so allege in good faith Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend per Kim v. Regents of Univ. of California, (2000) 80 Cal. App. 4th 160. Demurrer is overruled as to the 12th cause of action for accounting. It is sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1049 MARKET STREET, LLC VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

Parties to report re: their progress at 9:30 a.m. The Court is considering sanction award. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DANIEL S. HOSHIYAMA VS. CARMELO SOLANO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Amend Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 11, 2017, line 4. PLAINTIFF DANIEL HOSHIYAMA's Motion To Amend Complaint Defendant and his counsel are ordered to show cause why no proposed order sustaining defendant's demurrer was submitted to the Court for execution as ordered on November 1, 2016. Plaintiff may file and serve his amended complaint forthwith. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RITZ FLORES VS. RAMON RAMIREZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 11, 2017, line 5. DEFENDANT RAMON RAMIREZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint is sufficiently alleged and there is no misjoinder of parties. = (501/REQ)
